name: Metrocon Stavanger
description:
Metrocon er et alkoholfritt popkulturelt arrangement som er åpent og trygt for alle aldre som vil møtes for fellesinteresser innenfor animasjon, spill og tegneserier — enten iført kostymer eller som vanlige besøkende.

The convention is run by the volunteer organisation Stavanger Cons, with a core crew that has worked on Metrocon and similar events for over ten years. Activities include cosplay competitions, board and role-playing games, a Super Smash tournament, an art / merch marketplace, and assorted side events.
notes: Front page banner reads 'Metrocon arrangeres 3-4. Oktober på Clarion Hotel Energy!' — page was last published 2026-04-15 so the dates are for Metrocon 2026. Search results indicate the 2026 theme is 'Cyber'. Banner image is the og:image (a 2024 event photo) — fine as a placeholder hero, but verify rights before publishing. Description is largely the site's own meta description, kept in Norwegian as written.
